enrollment_recovery_plan: Mastropietro Company will extend supervised-use observation enrollment into the 2024 PMCF interval, perform monthly site activation follow-up, and approve a PMCF Plan amendment by 2024-03-31 if the 600-observation target or completion timing is revised.

activities.key_findings: 218 of 600 planned supervised-use observations were enrolled during the 2023 period. No permanent injury, death, or serious deterioration in health was observed. Transient pressure marks and skin redness resolved without medical intervention.
activities.impact_on_safety_performance: Findings support continued acceptability of the known skin-contact and pressure-control risks when fit checks and maximum cycle duration are followed.
activities.rmf_cer_update: RMF-HUG2000-RA will be updated with interim PMCF observations. CER-HUG2000 will consider the interim observations at the next scheduled review; no CER revision was completed during the 2023 reporting period.

activities.key_findings: Users identified alarm audibility and wrap-size selection as training-sensitive topics. No new user population or use environment was identified.
activities.impact_on_safety_performance: Feedback supports the IFU training update and does not identify a new safety or performance concern.
activities.rmf_cer_update: Training effectiveness to remain under CAPA04 monitoring.
